/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/ldsc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/regression.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/sumstats_commands.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/munge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/annotation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/ld_score.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ldsc.dir/src/continuous.cpp.o -o ldsc  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libbz2.so
